title: Day Counter
description: Displays the current Minecraft day with a clean, movable HUD.
body:
# Day Counter

A simple and lightweight HUD mod that displays the current Minecraft day.

---

## Features

- Displays the current Minecraft day in real time  
- Drag to reposition the HUD anywhere on screen  
- Center alignment guides for precise placement  
- Position is automatically saved  
- Fully compatible with resource packs and custom fonts  

---

## Controls

- Press **M** to open the position editor  
- Drag the display to move it  
- Alignment guides will appear when centered  
- Press **Esc** to save and exit  

---

## Compatibility

- Requires **Fabric Loader**  
- Requires **Fabric API**  
- Works with Minecraft **1.21.x**  

---

## Notes

This mod is designed to be minimal, clean, and unobtrusive while still giving you full control over placement.

---
